meta.description: Turns a single engagement learning/insight into a drafted LinkedIn post + short article, then emails the draft to the founder for review. Human-in-the-loop: the founder always edits for voice and truth before publishing. Trigger via the n8n form or webhook. Configure AI + email credentials.

parameters.formDescription: Drop one insight from this week's work. The agent drafts a post; you edit and publish.

parameters.subject: Content draft for review — {{ $('Insight Form').item.json['Angle'] }}
parameters.text:
Draft ready. Edit for voice + truth before publishing:

{{ $json.content[0].text }}

---
Reminder: verify every claim. Be your own best case study. Publish one artifact this week.

parameters.content:
## Human-in-the-loop
The agent NEVER publishes. It drafts and emails you. You edit for voice and truth, then post manually (or add a LinkedIn API node once you trust it).

Guardrail baked into the prompt: no invented client names, no fabricated metrics.
